message:
fix: upgrade Node.js from 18 to 20

Dependencies like @octokit/request-error@7.0.0 require Node >= 20.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -21,7 +21,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Set up Node.js
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
-          node-version: '18'
+          node-version: '20'
           cache: 'npm'
           cache-dependency-path: frontend/package-lock.json

@@ -17,7 +17,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Set up Node.js
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
-          node-version: '18'
+          node-version: '20'
           cache: 'npm'
           cache-dependency-path: frontend/package-lock.json
